subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! It is dawn, and each soul is enchanted and gladdened by some fancy, while I am occupied with pen and ink [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله بامداد است و هرکس بخیالی مفتون و دلشاد و من بقلم و مداد پرداخته
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @call to action
